en-US.title: Karna — AI Assistant
en-US.subtitle: Chat, tasks, memory, and skills
en-US.description:
Karna AI helps you stay on top of conversations, follow-ups, and important context from one mobile workspace.

Use Karna to:
• Chat with your AI assistant by text or voice
• Keep important memories and facts close at hand
• Capture tasks and reminders during the day
• Browse available skills connected to your Karna workspace
• Stay productive from your phone without juggling multiple tools

Karna works out of the box with the hosted Karna gateway, and advanced users can point the app at their own Karna deployment from Settings.

The mobile experience is built around the core Karna tabs you use every day: Chat, Tasks, Memory, Skills, and Settings.
en-US.releaseNotes: Fixed the cold-launch route, improved hosted connection defaults, and replaced the App Store screenshots with real in-app mobile UI.

review.notes: No sign-in is required for App Review. On a fresh install, Karna opens directly into the hosted Karna mobile workspace and connects to the hosted review gateway automatically. To test: 1) Launch the app and wait for the connection banner to clear, 2) Send a text message on the Chat tab or tap the microphone button for voice input, 3) Review the Tasks, Memory, Skills, and Settings tabs. If needed, leave the default gateway URL in Settings and tap Reconnect.
